what_it_does: Defines an SVG icon showing an arrow pointing up and to the right, drawn as stroked vector paths that inherit the current text color.
observations: Uses an SVG root with a 0 0 24 24 viewBox.
Sets fill to none and stroke to currentColor.
Uses stroke-width 1.5 with round line caps and joins.
Draws the icon with one path containing a diagonal line and an upper-right corner arrow shape.
standouts: Single-path construction for the full arrow glyph.
No explicit width or height is set on the SVG element.
conventions: Follows common 24x24 icon sizing via viewBox.
Uses stroke-based icon styling rather than filled shapes.
Uses rounded stroke endings and joins.
Keeps the SVG markup compact and inline.
notes: A compact currentColor arrow-up-right SVG suitable for reusable icon rendering.
questions: Should consumers provide width and height externally?
Is stroke-width 1.5 the intended weight for this icon set?
purpose_vs_actual: The filename indicates an arrow-up-right icon, and the SVG content draws that glyph.
intention_signals: It appears intended to provide a lightweight directional or external-link-style icon that adapts to surrounding UI color.
contribution: Contributes a reusable up-right arrow glyph with inherited color, rounded strokes, and compact SVG geometry.
summary_for_embedding: This is a 24x24 currentColor stroked SVG icon depicting an arrow pointing up and to the right.
intention_for_embedding: This file was for supplying a reusable arrow-up-right icon asset within a design system or UI asset set.
